curation_notes: Patch commit is a merge of PR #3095 (fix/xss_profile_form). Two files changed: the Django template generic_field.html removed the |safe filter from error message rendering (the primary XSS fix), and twocols_nav.js changed form targeting from $('form').first() to $(e.target).closest('form'). Locations derived directly from the patch diff. The template change is the main vulnerability; the JS change is a secondary fix related to incorrect form targeting.
